---
pagetitle: "Support Us | Cultural Health Connect"
description: "Support Cultural Health Connect's mission of culturally tailored health education in El Cajon — volunteer, partner, or spread the word."
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-h1" role="heading" aria-level="1" data-i18n="page-header-donate">Support Our Mission</div>
  <p class="page-sub" data-i18n="donate-sub">The most powerful gifts you can give us right now are time, expertise, and community voice.</p>
</div>

<div class="container section" style="text-align:center;">
  <p style="font-size:1.1rem; margin-top:1rem;" data-i18n="donate-p1">
    While we're not accepting monetary donations at this time, there are still powerful ways you can support our work.
  </p>
  <p data-i18n="donate-p2">
    Cultural Health Connect thrives on community energy—whether you're a local resident who wants to volunteer, a healthcare professional ready to lend your expertise, or someone across the country who shares our mission of culturally relevant care, there's a place for you here.
  </p>

  <div class="wwd-grid" style="text-align:center; margin-top:2rem;">
    <div class="wwd-card chc-reveal">
      <span class="wwd-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-person-plus-fill"></i></span>
      <h3 data-i18n="support1-title">Volunteer</h3>
      <p data-i18n="support1-text">Help with outreach, events, translation, design, or community organizing. Every skill matters.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wwd-card chc-reveal">
      <span class="wwd-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i></span>
      <h3 data-i18n="support2-title">Lend Clinical Expertise</h3>
      <p data-i18n="support2-text">Physicians, nurses, dietitians, and pharmacists: help us review materials and guide our programs.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wwd-card chc-reveal">
      <span class="wwd-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-shop-window"></i></span>
      <h3 data-i18n="support3-title">Partner With Us</h3>
      <p data-i18n="support3-text">Local businesses, clinics, mosques, churches, and community centers can distribute materials or host future workshops.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="wwd-card chc-reveal">
      <span class="wwd-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-megaphone-fill"></i></span>
      <h3 data-i18n="support4-title">Spread the Word</h3>
      <p data-i18n="support4-text">Share our free resources with family, friends, and neighbors. Good information travels through trusted voices—like yours.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p style="font-weight:700; color:var(--chc-navy); font-size:1.05rem; margin-top:2rem;" data-i18n="donate-p3">
    Join us in making health education more inclusive, compassionate, and impactful—right here in San Diego and beyond.
  </p>
  <p style="margin-top:2rem;">
    <a href="Contact.html" class="btn" data-i18n="btn-volunteer2">Become a Volunteer</a>
    &nbsp;
    <a href="Contact.html" class="btn btn-gold" data-i18n="btn-reach">Reach Out</a>
  </p>
</div>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="about.html" data-i18n="nav-about">About</a>
    <a href="Programs.html" data-i18n="nav-programs">Programs</a>
    <a href="Resources.html" data-i18n="nav-resources">Resources</a>
    <a href="FAQ.html" data-i18n="nav-faq">FAQ</a>
    <a href="Contact.html" data-i18n="nav-contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <span data-i18n="footer-short">© 2025 Cultural Health Connect</span>
  <span class="footer-disclaimer" data-i18n="footer-disclaimer">The content on this website is for general educational purposes only and is not medical advice. Always consult your doctor or another qualified health provider with questions about a medical condition.</span>
</footer>
```
